info.name: E-Bike Multiplatform API
info.description: Postman collection for testing all current Spring Boot APIs in the E-Bike backend. Run a login request first to populate jwt_token for protected endpoints.

request.description: Check backend health.
Create a new account and save token/user id when registration succeeds.
Login and save JWT token from AuthResponse.
Login and save enhanced JWT response fields.
Customer role login. Saves customer_token and jwt_token.
Staff role login. Saves staff_token and jwt_token.
Manager role login. Saves manager_token and jwt_token.
Admin role login. Saves admin_token and jwt_token.
Clear auth cookie. Bearer token variables are not cleared automatically.
Get current authenticated user from JWT/cookie. Returns 204 when anonymous.
Get profile for current authenticated user.

item.name: Get Profile - By Username Or Email

request.description: Get profile by username or email.
Return true when the current JWT is valid.
Extract username from the current JWT.
List active products. Saves first product_id and product_slug when available.
List products with optional filters: query, categoryId, minPrice, maxPrice.
Get product details by slug.
List active showrooms. Saves first showroom_id when available.
List active showrooms filtered by district.
List all orders. Requires authentication.
List orders for a user id. Requires authentication.
Get order details by id.
Calculate order subtotal, discount, registration fee, and total. Public endpoint.
Create a new order. Saves order_id when successful.
Update order status. Valid values: PENDING, CONFIRMED, PROCESSING, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED.
Create VNPay payment URL for an existing order.
Sandbox helper for VNPay IPN query parameters. Real VNPay requires a valid secure hash.
POST variant of VNPay IPN callback with query parameters.
VNPay browser return endpoint. Real VNPay requires a valid secure hash.
List favorite products for the authenticated user.
Add a product to authenticated user favorites.
Remove a product from authenticated user favorites.
Get basic user information by id.
List addresses for a user.
Create a billing or shipping address. addressType: BILLING or SHIPPING.

body.raw:
{
  "addressType": "SHIPPING",
  "street": "123 Test Street",
  "city": "Ho Chi Minh City",
  "postalCode": "700000",
  "country": "Vietnam",
  "isDefault": true
}

request.description: Get user preferences, with defaults when none exist.
Create or update user preferences.
Ask chatbot for product advice. Public endpoint.
Compatibility request using content instead of message.
Proxy a remote http/https image. Local/private hosts are blocked.
Admin only. Upload product image as multipart/form-data. Select a local file before sending.
Admin only. Get product image metadata by image id.
Admin only. Update image metadata and optionally replace file.
Admin only. Delete product image by image id.
Expected: 401 Unauthorized for wrong password.
Expected: 409 Conflict when email already exists.
Expected: 401 Unauthorized because /orders requires authentication.
Expected: 404 Not Found when product does not exist.
Expected: 400 Bad Request. Use BILLING or SHIPPING.

body.raw:
{
  "addressType": "HOME",
  "street": "123 Test Street",
  "city": "Ho Chi Minh City",
  "postalCode": "700000",
  "country": "Vietnam",
  "isDefault": false
}
